_help: mouse_sensitivity scales pointer speed on the iPad (0.3 slow … 2.5 fast).
daemon_host: 127.0.0.1 = an OpenSpan VM on THIS PC. Set it to another
machine's LAN IP (e.g. a spare laptop) to use that machine's Bluetooth
as the bridge, leaving this PC's radio free for headphones.
Restart the portal after changing anything here.
_clipboard: clipboard_token is minted on first launch and stays LOCAL (gitignored)
